name: CRUD Retur Barang - Tambah, Filter Supplier, Filter Tanggal, Hapus
description: Test CRUD retur barang: buat retur, filter, hapus. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Retur Barang menu in the sidebar
Retur Barang page is visible with return transaction list
Create return form or modal is open
Click the Retur Keluar button to select return out type
Select a warehouse from the Gudang dropdown
Click the Tambah Baris button to add an item row
Select a product from the first -- Pilih Barang -- dropdown in the table
Fill the quantity input in the table with 1
Click the Simpan Draft Retur button
New return transaction appears in the list table with Draft status
Click the delete/Hapus button on the draft transaction that was just created
A confirmation modal or dialog appears asking to confirm deletion
Return is removed from the list
